default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Train Alice on the offboarding process for departing employees, focusing on revoking access to key applications.](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Offboarding involves systematically removing access to core apps: Gmail, Slack, Notion, Airtable, Okta, 1Password, Zoom, Loom, Fathom](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Google Workspace admin panel is central for managing user access, groups, and connected applications](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Additional apps may require manual checks; no comprehensive list exists yet](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)

## Topics

### Core Application Access Removal

  - [Gmail: Suspend user in Google Workspace admin](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Slack: Suspend user in Slack admin](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [Notion: Remove from workspace, suspend in Organization Console](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [Airtable: Deactivate user in admin panel](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Okta: Deactivate user in admin dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [1Password: Suspend access in admin dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [Zoom: Deactivate user, option to transfer meetings](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=2816.0)
  - [Loom: Deactivate user in Workspace settings](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=2841.0)
  - [Fathom: Deactivate as "ex-employee" to retain shared recordings](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=2880.0)

### Google Workspace Detailed Cleanup

  - [Security tab: Reset sign-in cookies, remove app-specific passwords](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
  - [Remove iOS/Android/Chrome devices](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [Review connected applications for additional access points](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
  - [Remove user from all groups](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=3000.0)

### Additional Considerations

  - [Linear: Check if user was set up, remove if necessary](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)
  - [Deal: Only address if user was an admin](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=2965.0)
  - [Air Ops: No longer in use, can be skipped](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - Atlas: No action required
  - [Otter: Not actively used, can be ignored](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=2953.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alice to review and familiarize with the offboarding process](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=3049.0)
  - [Yousef to investigate the origin of "growthxcollaborators.slack.com"](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=3085.0)
  - [Develop a comprehensive list of all applications requiring access removal](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=3011.0)
  - [Consider granting Alice admin rights in Okta for future offboarding tasks](https://fathom.video/share/6PCZAxRadNH2tF_3eN66pxDrniWAaVQE?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)

action_items.description: Review & practice employee access termination process (Gmail, Slack, Notion, Airtable, Okta, 1Password, Zoom, Loom, Fathom, Linear)
Investigate origin and purpose of growthxcollaborators.slack.com Slack community
